title: hibiscus surattensis var. genuinus
intro: Hibiscus surattensis var. genuinus, also known as the large yellow hibiscus or mountain rose, is a variety of the hibiscus surattensis plant, a flowering plant native to Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for centuries, particularly in China, where it is valued for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and diuretic effects. The health benefits of hibiscus surattensis var. genuinus include lowering blood pressure, reducing cholesterol levels, and aiding in digestion, making it a popular herbal remedy for cardiovascular health and digestive issues. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, with the flowers being used fresh or dried and sometimes combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
